[2026-04-01 21:18:53.684] [CopilotPrompt]

I wont be touching the web page aspect of the app today, only the model of the classes today. I need 7 meaningful classes and i have some ideas that I will give you so just make them fit into the project following the guidelines of the .md file.
Classes: Team, Player, User(abstract class) - ForumUser (can view the page and write comments and threads), AdminUser(can make new threads and edit tournaments and such, basically an admin), EventVenue (a location which events take place in), Tournament, Forum(user generated forums, basically threads of discussion between users which will be displayed in a specific part of the page)

Can you tell me if thats a good structure for the app and create those classes in the project where they are supposed to go and make some properties for them following the md file
